```{.tikz}
%%| width: 50%
\usetikzlibrary{backgrounds}
\begin{tikzpicture}[every path/.style={white}]

\draw(0,0) -- (0.5,0.5) -- (1,1) -- (1.5,0.5) -- (2,1) -- (2.5,0.5) -- (3,1) -- (3.5,1.5) -- (4,2) -- (4.5,1.5);
\draw(0,-0.05) -- (0.5,0.45) -- (1,-0.05) -- (1.5,0.45) -- (2,0.95) -- (2.5,0.45) -- (3,0.95) -- (3.5,1.45) -- (4,0.95) -- (4.5,1.45);
\draw(0,-0.1) -- (0.5,0.4) -- (1,-0.1) -- (1.5,0.4) -- (2,0.9) -- (2.5,0.4) -- (3,0.9) -- (3.5,1.4) -- (4,0.9) -- (4.5,1.4);
\draw(0,-0.15) -- (0.5,0.35) -- (1,-0.15) -- (1.5,0.35) -- (2,-0.15) -- (2.5,0.35) -- (3,0.85) -- (3.5,0.35) -- (4,0.85) -- (4.5,1.35);
\draw(0,-0.2) -- (0.5,-0.7) -- (1,-0.2) -- (1.5,0.3) -- (2,-0.2) -- (2.5,0.3) -- (3,0.8) -- (3.5,0.3) -- (4,0.8) -- (4.5,1.3);
\draw(0,-0.25) -- (0.5,-0.75) -- (1,-0.25) -- (1.5,0.25) -- (2,-0.25) -- (2.5,0.25) -- (3,-0.25) -- (3.5,0.25) -- (4,0.75) -- (4.5,1.25);
\draw(0,-0.3) -- (0.5,-0.8) -- (1,-0.3) -- (1.5,-0.8) -- (2,-0.3) -- (2.5,0.2) -- (3,-0.3) -- (3.5,0.2) -- (4,0.7) -- (4.5,1.2);
\draw(0,-1.35) -- (0.5,-0.85) -- (1,-0.35) -- (1.5,-0.85) -- (2,-0.35) -- (2.5,0.15) -- (3,-0.35) -- (3.5,0.15) -- (4,0.65) -- (4.5,0.15);\node at (4,1.6) {1};
\node at (1,0.5) {1};
\node at (2,0.4) {3};
\node at (3,0.3) {5};
\node at (4,0.3) {8};
\node at (3.5,0.95) {3};
\node at (4.5,0.75) {7};
\node at (0,-0.9) {7};
\node at (1,-0.9) {8};
\node at (2,-0.9) {8};
\node at (3,-0.9) {8};
\node at (4,-0.9) {8};
\node at (0.5,-0.2) {4};
\node at (1.5,-0.3) {6};
\node at (2.5,-0.3) {8};
\node at (3.5,-0.3) {8};
\node at (4.5,-0.3) {8};
\node at (0.5,-1.2) {\vdots};
\node at (1.5,-1.2) {\vdots};
\node at (2.5,-1.2) {\vdots};
\node at (3.5,-1.2) {\vdots};
\node at (4.5,-1.2) {\vdots};
\node at (0.5,-1.2) {\vdots};
\node at (3,1.6) {0};
\node at (2,1.6) {0};
\node at (1,1.6) {0};
\node at (0,1.6) {0};
\node at (2.5,1) {0};
\node at (1.5,1) {0};
\node at (0.5,1) {0};
\node at (0,0.5) {0};


\end{tikzpicture}
```
